scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/web build && corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/server build:node
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/core test && corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/server test && corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/interop test && corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/web test
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/core exec tsc --noEmit && corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/server exec tsc --noEmit && corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/interop exec tsc --noEmit && corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/web exec tsc --noEmit
scripts.deploy: node -e "console.log('Railway deploys from Dockerfile via Railway. Cloudflare rollback: corepack pnpm deploy:cf')"
scripts.deploy:cf: corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/web build && corepack pnpm --filter @figcad/server deploy
